creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169557
add rpi2 support

Hi,

This patch brings support for kodi on armv6, only the raspberrypi2 is supported.

The rpi doesn't need an xorg/x11/gl/sdl stack so I move all the 'xorg' stuff in
an ifdef ${ARCH} block

A repo for FreeBSD:11:armv6 is available for testing here:
kodi: {
  url: "http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/kodi-repo/",
  enabled: yes
}
